description: Industry benchmark reference values. Each benchmark is a published median for B2B services / agency sales motions in the $10K-$100K ACV band. Sources cited per metric. Update annually as new reports are published. The dashboard ONLY displays a benchmark line if its key matches; missing benchmarks render the field without a reference rather than fabricating one.

winRate.note: Median win rate across B2B services teams, $10K-$100K ACV band.

medianSalesCycleDays.label: 84 days
medianSalesCycleDays.note: Median Lead-to-Won cycle for B2B services with mid-ACV deals.

pipelineCoverageRatio.label: 3.5x
pipelineCoverageRatio.note: Ratio of open pipeline value to quarterly target.

Qualifying Call Booked__Call Complete -.note: Discovery completion rate where lead is qualified.

Call Complete - Good Fit__Context Call -.note: Indicative only — refine with Navora historicals once 12 months of data exist.
